final:
module detailed_module (
    input g, 
    input h, 
    input i, 
    input j,
    output reg y);assign y = (~g & h & ~i & j) | (~g & ~h & i & j) | (g & h & i & j) | (g & h & ~i & j);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y <= 1; if (g == 1 && h == 0 && i == 1 && j == 0) y <= 0;
    end
  end

endmodule
